steps.title: Test each point
steps.content: A point is a solution when its coordinates make $y\le 5x-21$ true. Substitute each listed point into the inequality.

steps.title: Find the true inequality
steps.content:
For the point $(5,-21)$, the substitution gives
$$-21\le 5(5)-21$$
$$-21\le 4$$
This is true. The other listed points give false inequalities.

steps.title: Choose the solution point
steps.content: Only the point $(5,-21)$ satisfies the inequality. The answer is C.
